creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-11-01 22:03:46 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    audio                Makefile 
  Added files:
    audio/xpi-musicpm    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  Music Player Minion is a client for the Music Player Daemon network
  music player. The purpose of MPD and it's clients is to allow music
  playback on one PC (such as a home media server) to be controlled
  from another over the network.
  
  WWW: http://code.google.com/p/musicpm/
  
  PR:             ports/128442
  Submitted by:   Dennis Herrmann <adox at mcx2.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.994     +1 -0      ports/audio/Makefile
  1.1       +22 -0     ports/audio/xpi-musicpm/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/audio/xpi-musicpm/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/audio/xpi-musicpm/pkg-descr (new)
